'state as Partial<GridStateValues>' (L112) — narrowing cast to match serializeGridState param, no 'any' involved.

B-03.evidence: useStoragePersist uses only React (useEffect, useRef) + internal useDebouncedCallback + internal serializeState. No TanStack internal APIs. Web Storage API (localStorage/sessionStorage) is browser standard. No new npm packages.

This is 'intentional mount-only' category, not C-32 option 3 (unstable-setter bypass). Save-trigger useEffect uses saveRef.current() — refs are auto-excluded by react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, no eslint-disable needed. C-32 option 3 = 0 occurrences added.

c32UnstableSetterPass.evidence: D2 Option A fully applied: saveRef = useRef(debouncedSave) + always-sync useEffect (no deps). Save-trigger useEffect calls saveRef.current() only — ref excluded automatically by react-hooks/exhaustive-deps. onHydrate handled via hydrateRef (option 2, D5). C-32 option 3 occurrences added = 0. Cumulative option 3 count: G-004 (1) + G-005 (1) = 2 total. G-006 adds 0.

specCodeDefects.defectDescription: Spec code stub contains second eslint-disable-next-line in save-trigger useEffect (L546: '// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps'). But D2 explicitly states 'eslint-disable 0줄'. Section 13.2 reconciles: these 2 eslint-disable are 'C-32 option 3 아님 (mount-only / saveRef.current 정당한 제외)'. However, saveRef.current is a ref — react-hooks/exhaustive-deps auto-excludes refs, so eslint-disable on save-trigger useEffect is unnecessary.
specCodeDefects.fixDescription: Applied 'tight read': save-trigger useEffect has NO eslint-disable (saveRef.current is auto-excluded by eslint). Only mount-only [] useEffect gets 1 eslint-disable. Total = 1 eslint-disable (not 2 as spec template shows). Honors D2 spirit more closely.
specCodeDefects.specInternalConflict: D2 says 0줄, Section 11.1 template shows 2, Section 13.2 says 2건 (C-32 option 3 아님). Resolution: tight read → 1 (mount-only only, saveRef.current auto-excluded).
